description: Checkout counts for all courses with permanent reserves (items that have no reserve end date). Date range filters apply to checkout counts only — not to the reserve itself, since permanent reserves have no end date by definition. Historical toggle controls whether non-current reserve records are included.

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types — comma-separated flags [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Include non-current (inactive) reserve records (1 to toggle ON)
